task_description: Assess whether Backwards Instructional Design reduces ambiguity at session start.

events.text: What does Backwards Instructional Design mean in this context?

BID means: define the desired endpoint before designing the investigation path. In the Contract Window context, the researcher states the falsifiable claim they want to test before opening the session. CONSTRUCTED — definition.
Is it possible BID just frontloads the work without reducing drift?

That is a testable counter-hypothesis. BID_ONLY is one of the six conditions precisely to isolate whether BID alone — without the Contract Window or Bicameral Review — produces measurable drift reduction. CONSTRUCTED.
